meta.objective: Remove redundant lesson-title repetition, format lesson live-trace sections as readable rows, and audit every interactive visual so it directly teaches its lesson mechanism.

tasks.title: Remove redundant lesson-title repetition
tasks.objective: Replace repeated page-title interpolations with concise, section-specific headings that state the learning action or decision.
acceptanceCriteria: The lesson title remains prominent once at page level and is not mechanically repeated across instructional section headings.
Every replacement heading remains descriptive, accessible, and specific to the section's educational purpose.
Tests prevent the removed repetitive title patterns from returning.
tasks.details: Audit course-app, guide, evidence, further-reading, discussion, mastery, specialization, next-use, and capstone headings. Preserve ARIA context where the lesson title remains useful.

validationCommands.evidence: Focused heading and curriculum tests passed.

validationCommands.command: rg repetitive title interpolation patterns in app
validationCommands.evidence: No visible mechanical lesson-title interpolation remains in the audited shared headings.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: The lesson title remains prominent once at page level and is not mechanically repeated across instructional section headings.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Visible shared headings now name the section action; title remains in the page heading and accessibility context.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Every replacement heading remains descriptive, accessible, and specific to the section's educational purpose.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Headings now name prediction, mechanism tracing, transfer, verification, evidence, and reflection tasks.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Tests prevent the removed repetitive title patterns from returning.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: content-ux regression assertions reject the prior interpolation patterns.

evidence: Browser DOM snapshot confirmed shortened headings on Probability, Softmax & Cross-Entropy.

commit.message: Not committed because the shared dirty worktree contains extensive overlapping user and prior-agent changes.

tasks.title: Reformat live-trace sections as readable rows
tasks.objective: Replace the three-column live-trace heading and dense stage presentation with a single-column editorial row flow while preserving the anchored visual narrative.
acceptanceCriteria: Lesson live-trace headers read as rows rather than three parallel columns.
Stage explanations use one readable text column at desktop, tablet, and mobile widths.
Sticky scroll behavior, keyboard stage controls, reduced motion, and narrow-screen overflow remain correct.
tasks.details: Update scroll-story markup/CSS only where layout improves comprehension; keep the homepage story behavior coherent.

validationCommands.evidence: Desktop header resolved to one 982px column; narrow header/copy resolved to one 354px column with no horizontal overflow.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Lesson live-trace headers read as rows rather than three parallel columns.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Eyebrow, title, and introduction now occupy one editorial column.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Stage explanations use one readable text column at desktop, tablet, and mobile widths.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Copy remains one column and mobile controls scroll horizontally without page overflow.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Sticky scroll behavior, keyboard stage controls, reduced motion, and narrow-screen overflow remain correct.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Browser QA measured sticky top 88px at desktop, relative positioning at 390px, unique accessible controls, and zero horizontal overflow.

evidence: Homepage stage button moved the active article while the visual remained anchored at top 88px.
Probability trace measured one-column header and copy at desktop and narrow widths.

commit.message: Not committed because the shared dirty worktree contains extensive overlapping user and prior-agent changes.

tasks.title: Audit and differentiate every interaction
tasks.objective: Ensure every lesson's live trace and lab exposes its actual mechanism through an appropriate visual grammar or interaction rather than generic themed motion.
acceptanceCriteria: All 44 lesson motion stories have an explicit concept-to-visual rationale and no lesson falls back to decorative motion.
Concept families use meaningfully different visual grammars where the mechanism calls for matrices, paths, filters, queues, boundaries, comparisons, routing, or interventions.
Existing topic-specific labs are audited and any weak interaction is repaired or documented with its evidence boundary.
tasks.details: Audit lesson-motion, Three.js renderer, CSS overlays, and all lesson-labs dispatches. Preserve deterministic seeds, progressive enhancement, and reduced-motion fallback.

validationCommands.evidence: All 24 semantic grammars and all 44 lesson motion stories passed coverage checks.
New SVG diagrams and semantic registry type-check.
Embedding lookup, attention matrix, security boundary, expert routing, and causal intervention grammars rendered with no page overflow after the popover repair.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: All 44 lesson motion stories have an explicit concept-to-visual rationale and no lesson falls back to decorative motion.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Every lesson maps through one of 24 exhaustive semantic contracts with a learning question, representation, and evidence boundary.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Concept families use meaningfully different visual grammars where the mechanism calls for matrices, paths, filters, queues, boundaries, comparisons, routing, or interventions.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: 24 distinct SVG grammars now carry the meaning above the progressive Three.js field.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Existing topic-specific labs are audited and any weak interaction is repaired or documented with its evidence boundary.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: All 34 lab types were reviewed and documented; the shared generic overlay was the weak surface and was replaced, while strong lab controls were retained.

evidence: docs/INTERACTION_AUDIT.md covers 24 live-trace concepts and 34 lab types.
Browser stage transition on embedding changed active state to ROW LOOKUP while retaining sticky anchoring.

commit.message: Not committed because the shared dirty worktree contains extensive overlapping user and prior-agent changes.

tasks.title: Verify and codify readable instructional interactions
tasks.objective: Add durable interaction-quality checks, perform desktop/narrow/reduced-motion QA, and pass the complete repository verification suite.
acceptanceCriteria: Focused tests enforce concise headings, row layout, and explicit visual semantics for all lessons.
Desktop and narrow browser QA confirm readability, focus/touch behavior, sticky flow, and no overflow.
AGENTS.md records the visual-mechanism and readability review contract; npm run lint and npm test pass.
tasks.details: Update tests and documentation after implementation, then run TypeScript, focused tests, lint, and full tests.

validationCommands.evidence: TypeScript passed after semantic diagram integration.
Static export, 44 route verification, 13 preserved artifact checks, and all 90 regression tests passed.
Sticky desktop flow, row headings, responsive controls, distinct representative grammars, and overflow checks passed.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Focused tests enforce concise headings, row layout, and explicit visual semantics for all lessons.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Regression tests reject repeated title interpolation, require one-column instructional rows, and exhaustively cover 24 semantic grammars and 44 lesson stories.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: Desktop and narrow browser QA confirm readability, focus/touch behavior, sticky flow, and no overflow.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: Stage buttons were unique and keyboard-accessible, desktop stage stayed sticky at 88px, 390px changed to relative flow with horizontal stage-control scrolling, and all observed page overflow was eliminated.

acceptanceCheckResults.criterion: AGENTS.md records the visual-mechanism and readability review contract; npm run lint and npm test pass.
acceptanceCheckResults.details: The new interaction review contract and audit are documented; final lint and all 90 tests pass.

evidence: GitHub Pages static export verified 44 lesson routes, 411 files, 5.94 MB.
Browser QA confirmed lookup, attention-matrix, trust-boundary, expert-router, and causal-intervention grammars.
Security source popover was repaired after browser QA exposed right-edge overflow.

commit.message: Not committed because the shared dirty worktree contains extensive overlapping user and prior-agent changes.
